quote: Throughout the Adaptive Sports course, Ms. Pilch consistently demonstrated a high level of dedication, responsibility, and professionalism.
longQuote: Throughout the Adaptive Sports course, Ms. Pilch consistently demonstrated a high level of dedication, responsibility, and professionalism. During practical sessions involving individuals with disabilities, Ms. Pilch distinguished herself through her empathy, patience, and strong interpersonal skills.
name: Jarosław Amarowicz, PhD
role: Research Assistant · Institute of Physiotherapy, Jagiellonian University Medical College
